title: Slice 2: Multiple Keys + Rotation + Health Tracking
description:
## Parent

pi-model-router-3rd (Key Pool Manager PRD)

## What to build

Rotation strategies (round-robin + fallback) dan error-based health tracking di ModelKeyPool. Round-robin: distribusi merata antar healthy keys. Fallback: prioritas urutan, skip cooldown/dead.

markFailed() mengklasifikasi error: rate-limit → cooldown 5m, 401/403 → dead 1 jam (time-based recovery), 5xx → cooldown 1m, lainnya → cooldown 30s. markSuccess() mereset health ke healthy. Lazy health recovery: expired cooldown/dead auto-kembali ke healthy di filter isHealthy().

Clear() reset semua pool state.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Round-robin: key 1 → key 2 → key 3 → key 1 (hanya healthy keys)
- [ ] Fallback: key 1 preferred, skip kalo cooldown/dead
- [ ] markFailed: 429 → cooldown 5m, 401/403 → dead 1h, 5xx → cooldown 1m, lainnya → cooldown 30s
- [ ] markFailed: defensive error.message pattern (bukan asumsi Error instance)
- [ ] markSuccess: reset failures counter + status ke healthy
- [ ] Lazy recovery: expired cooldown auto healthy di getNextKey()
- [ ] Dead recovery: expired dead auto healthy setelah 1 jam
- [ ] isHealthy: filter skip cooldown & dead keys
- [ ] Unit test: rotation output, health transitions, edge cases
- [ ] Concurrent request safety: getNextKey synchronous, no race condition

## Blocked by

pi-model-router-3rd.1 (Slice 1: Key Pool Foundation)

title: Slice 1: Key Pool Foundation + Single-Key Auth
description:
## Parent

pi-model-router-3rd (Key Pool Manager PRD)

## What to build

Implementasi dasar Key Pool Manager: file key-pool.ts dengan ModelKeyPool class, keys-config.ts untuk load/merge router-keys.json dari global (~/.pi/agent/) dan project (.pi/) scope, modifikasi provider.ts untuk ganti auth lookup dengan key pool auth di-pass sebagai parameter ke tryModel(), modifikasi index.ts untuk lifecycle init/cleanup.

Kirim auth error ALWAYS ke markFailed (tanpa gate isTransientError). Panggil markSuccess pas tryModel sukses. Fallback langsung ke registry.getApiKeyAndHeaders() (bukan getCachedAuth) saat key pool return null.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] key-pool.ts: ModelKeyPool class dengan getNextKey(), markFailed(), markSuccess(), getStatus(), reload(), clear()
- [ ] keys-config.ts: loadKeysConfig() membaca dan merge global + project scope, normalizeKeysConfig() validasi
- [ ] provider.ts: streamSimple pake key pool auth untuk provider yang terdaftar, fallback ke pi auth untuk yang tidak
- [ ] provider.ts: error always forwarded ke markFailed, success forwarded ke markSuccess
- [ ] index.ts: key pool init di session_start, cleanup di session_shutdown
- [ ] .gitignore tambah .pi/router-keys.json
- [ ] Unit test: key-pool.test.ts (pure logic, 0 mock)
- [ ] Unit test: keys-config.test.ts (mock fs)
- [ ] No regression: tanpa router-keys.json, provider behave seperti sekarang

## Blocked by

None — can start immediately

title: Key Pool Manager — Centralized API Key Management with Rotation
description: Add centralized API key management to pi-simple-router: multiple keys per provider, auto-rotation, health tracking, cooldown/dead recovery. See docs/prd-key-pool-manager.md for full PRD.

title: Integrasi practice / sign-off
description:
## Parent

Parent PRD: pi-model-router-6bw (Problem Statement), pi-model-router-ej1 (Testing Decisions)

## What to build

Verifikasi manual bahwa fix bekerja di pi. Setelah Slice 1 dan 2 diimplementasikan dan dideploy:

1. Reload router extension
2. Test dengan model yang sengaja rate-limited atau error
3. Verifikasi expected behaviour: model gagal di turn 1 langsung di-skip di turn 2, turn 3, seterusnya
4. Verifikasi `/router clearcache` mereset cooldown
5. Verifikasi tidak ada regresi — model healthy tetap dipakai

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] User test langsung di pi dan konfirmasi expected behaviour tercapai
- [ ] Tidak ada regresi yang terdeteksi

## Blocked by

- pi-model-router-olj (Cooldown untuk semua model error)
- pi-model-router-by6 (Cooldown untuk error-after-content)

title: Cooldown untuk error-after-content
description:
## Parent

Parent PRD: pi-model-router-6bw (Problem Statement), pi-model-router-35e (Implementation Decisions)

## What to build

Refactor `tryModel` di `provider.ts` agar error dari delegated stream yang terjadi SETELAH konten tetap dipropagasi ke outer catch untuk cooldown. Saat ini error-after-content hanya di-push ke stream tanpa trigger `markRateLimited`.

Perubahan di file: `extensions/provider.ts` — fungsi `tryModel`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Delegated stream yang mengirim `text_delta` lalu `error` → error dipropagasi ke outer catch → `markRateLimited(ref)` dipanggil
- [ ] Test: mock stream kirim `text_delta` → `error` event → `markRateLimited` dipanggil
- [ ] Test: dua sequential `streamSimple` calls → model dengan error-after-content di call pertama di-skip di call kedua
- [ ] Fallback notification tetap muncul di stream (user tetap lihat pesan fallback)

## Blocked by

- pi-model-router-olj (Cooldown untuk semua model error)
close_reason: implemented: commit e3edd12 — cooldown untuk error-after-content

title: Cooldown untuk semua model error
description:
## Parent

Parent PRD: pi-model-router-6bw (Problem Statement), pi-model-router-35e (Implementation Decisions)

## What to build

Hapus guard `isTransientError` di catch block `routeStream` di `provider.ts`. Saat ini `markRateLimited` hanya dipanggil kalau error message match `TRANSIENT_PATTERNS`. Ubah jadi SEMUA error (termasuk non-transient) trigger `markRateLimited`.

**Provider-level cooldown tetap gated** oleh `isProviderLevelError` — hanya error 502/503/504/sejenis yang trigger cooldown `__provider:{name}`.

Perubahan hanya di file: `extensions/provider.ts`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Catch block di `routeStream` memanggil `markRateLimited(ref)` untuk SEMUA error (tidak ada pengecualian selain `RouterAbortError`)
- [ ] `isProviderLevelError` masih dihormati — provider-level cooldown hanya untuk 502/503/504/sejenis
- [ ] Test: mock delegated `streamSimple` throw error dengan message yang tidak match `TRANSIENT_PATTERNS` → `markRateLimited(ref)` dipanggil
- [ ] Test: dua sequential `streamSimple` calls → model yang gagal di call pertama di-skip di call kedua

## Blocked by

None — can start immediately

title: Slice 4: Key Validation + Edge Case Polish
description:
## Parent

pi-model-router-3rd (Key Pool Manager PRD)

## What to build

Fitur validasi dan edge case handling untuk key pool manager.

- /router keys test <provider> — test semua keys dengan ping API /models endpoint provider, report valid/invalid
- Error rate tracking: key yang sering error (bukan cuma 429/401) auto cooldown
- Recovery after all keys cooldown: graceful messaging, bukan silent fallback
- Concurrent request test: verifikasi JavaScript event loop safety
- Manual testing di pi real environment dengan multiple providers

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] /router keys test <provider> — ping API, report valid/invalid per key
- [ ] Error rate tracking: key dengan error rate tinggi auto cooldown
- [ ] All keys dead: graceful messaging ke user
- [ ] Manual test: 3 key round-robin, rate limit, recovery
- [ ] Manual test: tidak ada regresi di provider tanpa key pool
- [ ] Manual test: reload setelah add/remove keys

## Blocked by

pi-model-router-3rd.2 (Slice 2: Multiple Keys + Rotation)
pi-model-router-3rd.3 (Slice 3: Key Management Commands)

title: Slice 3: Key Management Commands
description:
## Parent

pi-model-router-3rd (Key Pool Manager PRD)

## What to build

keys-commands.ts dengan /router keys submenu. Integrasi ke commands.ts sebagai submenu /router keys.

Subcommands:
- /router keys status — tampilkan key pools, health per key, active key, strategy
- /router keys reload — reload dari file (atomic replacement, bukan mutate in-place)
- /router keys add <provider> — input key aman (gak tampil di terminal), simpan ke file
- /router keys remove <provider> — pilih key yang mau dihapus via ctx.ui.select
- /router keys clearcache — reset semua cooldown/dead state

Footer status: tampilkan ringkasan key pools di pi footer pas model router aktif.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] /router keys status — nampilin key pools, health, strategy, active key
- [ ] /router keys reload — reload dari file, atomic replacement
- [ ] /router keys add <provider> — input aman, simpan ke file
- [ ] /router keys remove <provider> — selector untuk pilih key, hapus dari file
- [ ] /router keys clearcache — reset semua health state
- [ ] Footer status — ringkasan key pools
- [ ] No regression: /router tanpa "keys" tetap nampilin main menu
- [ ] Input keys tidak tampil di terminal history

## Blocked by

pi-model-router-3rd.2 (Slice 2: Multiple Keys + Rotation + Health Tracking)

title: Out of Scope
description:
- **Persistent cooldown across pi restarts**: Cooldown is in-memory only (Map). This PRD does not add persistence. On restart, all models are fresh.
- **Per-model cooldown duration config**: Uses a single `rateLimitCooldownMs` for all models. Per-model cooldown config is future work.
- **Separate "permanent error" blacklist**: Non-transient errors currently get the same cooldown as transient errors. A separate permanent blacklist (models that should never be retried) is out of scope.
- **Heuristic routing**: No changes to the model selection algorithm beyond cooldown-based skipping.
- **TUI changes**: No changes to UI components.

title: User Stories
description:
1. As a pi user with a router worker of 7 models where models 1-3 are consistently failing, I want those failed models to be skipped entirely on subsequent turns, so that I don't waste 9+ seconds per turn waiting for guaranteed failures.
2. As a pi user experiencing rate limits, I want rate-limited models to enter cooldown and be skipped on subsequent turns, so that I never retry a rate-limited model before its cooldown expires.
3. As a pi user whose model errors with a non-standard error message (e.g. "The provider encountered an issue"), I want that model to still be marked for cooldown and skipped on future turns, so that even errors with non-matching message patterns don't cause infinite retry loops.
4. As a pi user whose model streams partial content then hits a rate limit mid-response, I want that model to still be marked for cooldown on future turns, so that error-after-content scenarios don't silently bypass the cooldown system.
5. As a pi user whose temporarily-broken model recovers after some time, I want cooldowns to naturally expire and re-enable the model, so that recovered models are automatically tried again without manual intervention.
6. As a pi user who wants to force-reset all cooldowns (e.g. after adding a new API key), I want `/router clearcache` to clear all error states, so that I can manually reset the cooldown system.
7. As a pi user, I want the fallback notification message to clearly distinguish between "rate-limited (cooldown)" and "error (cooldown)" and "error (permanent)", so that I understand why specific models are being skipped.
8. As a pi user whose provider-wide outage occurs (502/503), I want the entire provider's models to be cooldowned, so that I don't retry each model of a dead provider individually.
9. As a developer maintaining the router extension, I want the cooldown logic to be testable via unit tests that verify `markRateLimited` is called for ALL error types, so that the fix is regression-proof.
10. As a developer maintaining the router extension, I want the `isRateLimited` check to correctly skip cooldowned models across multiple `streamSimple` calls, so that the "skip on next turn" behaviour works reliably.

title: Further Notes
description:
- The `isTransientError` function in `rate-limit-tracker.ts` continues to exist and may be useful for telemetry/logging even though it no longer gates cooldown application.
- Provider-level cooldown (`__provider:{name}`) correctly checks `isProviderLevelError` — only 502/503/504-like errors should cooldown the entire provider. Individual model errors should only cooldown that specific model.
- The existing "abort" guard (`RouterAbortError`) correctly does NOT trigger cooldown — pi-level timeouts are not model failures.
- After implementing, run `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` to verify no regressions.

title: Problem Statement
description:
The router extension iterates through a fallback chain of models on every turn (`streamSimple` call). When a model errors or hits a rate limit, the error state is not always recorded in the cooldown map (`RATE_LIMITED`). This causes two problems:
1. **Permanent retry loop**: Models that fail with non-transient errors (e.g. model not found, generic upstream error) are never marked for cooldown. They retry on every turn, burn time, and fail again — wasting 10-30 seconds per turn before reaching a working model.
2. **Error-after-content misses cooldown**: If a model streams partial content then errors (e.g. rate-limited mid-response), the error event is forwarded to the user but `markRateLimited` is never called. On the next turn the same model is tried again from scratch.
**Current behaviour** (7 models, models 1-3 broken, model 4 working):
```
Turn 1:  model 1 (rate-limit, 3s) → model 2 (error, 3s) → model 3 (error, 3s) → model 4 ✓
Turn 2:  model 1 (rate-limit, 3s) → model 2 (error, 3s) → model 3 (error, 3s) → model 4 ✓
Turn 3:  model 1 (rate-limit, 3s) → model 2 (error, 3s) → model 3 (error, 3s) → model 4 ✓
...
```
Every turn wastes ~9s retrying models that are guaranteed to fail.
notes: Slice 1 selesai: commit 0d7ea60 — cooldown untuk semua model error

title: Solution
description:
Make ALL failed models "invisible" on subsequent turns by applying cooldown to every error — not just "transient" errors matching a fixed keyword list. When a model fails for any reason (rate limit, transient server error, permanent error, error-after-content), it enters cooldown and is skipped on the next turn.
**Expected behaviour:**
```
Turn 1:  model 1 (rate-limit)                 → model 2 (error) → model 3 (error) → model 4 ✓
Turn 2:  model 4 ✓                              (1,2,3 invisible)
Turn 3:  model 4 ✓                              (1,2,3 invisible)
Turn 4:  model 4 (rate-limit)                  → model 5 ✓
Turn 5:  model 5 ✓                              (1,2,3,4 invisible)
```
- All failed models get cooldown → invisible on next turn
- Rate-limited models get cooldown (unchanged)
- Error models get cooldown (NEW — previously only transient errors)
- Error-after-content models get cooldown (NEW — previously never cooldowned)
- Cooldown expiry re-enables the model (if still broken, fails again and re-enters cooldown)
- `/router clearcache` resets all cooldowns manually
